mission.title: meshery: Versioning poc
mission.description:
**Description**
A PoC about versioning the Docs Site.
I have a index.html to parse the last most recent version registered, in the _data/versions.yml file (made a little template there).
And then I included the dropdown version selector from the left sidebar.
It would imply that every version to be published here has a specific DOCS files and content. For everyone of these, permalinks would be updated.
And for every new version, the process would be:
1. Create a folder in docs/versions/vX.x.m 
     1. (v= version, X= ver Number, x=major change, m=min change)
2. Add the version data in the docs/_data/versions.yml (following template)
3. Edit the files for the version documentation
4. Update the permalink in FRONT MATTER of each file
5. Done

This PR fixes #1304 

**Notes for Reviewers**
Please check this out @chandrashritii, @jesuslerma, @anirudhjain75, @leecalcote 
Thanks in advance.

**[Signed commits](https://github.com/layer5io/meshery/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#signing-off-on-comm

resolution.summary: Fancy! 😄
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
